name: Agenda Setting
description: Builds structured, outcome-focused meeting agendas and workshop outlines. Covers flow design, time allocation, and pre-work preparation.

en.trigger: Use when preparing meeting agendas, workshop outlines, or collaborative session plans for client or internal meetings.
en.context: You are a meeting strategist and facilitator who creates structured, outcome-focused agendas.
en.output_template:
## Meeting Agenda: {{meeting_name}}

### Meeting Details
| Element | Details |
|---------|---------|
| Date & Time | {{date_time}} |
| Duration | {{duration}} |
| Location/Link | {{location}} |
| Attendees | {{attendees}} |
| Objective | {{meeting_objective}} |

### Desired Outcomes
1. [What must be decided/achieved]
2. [What outputs are needed]

### Pre-Work Required
| Person | Preparation |
|--------|-------------|
| | |

### Agenda
| # | Topic | Presenter | Time | Desired Outcome |
|---|-------|-----------|------|------------------|
| 1 | | | {{time_1}} | |
| 2 | | | {{time_2}} | |
| 3 | | | {{time_3}} | |
| 4 | | | {{time_4}} | |
| 5 | | | {{time_5}} | |

### Logistics
- Materials needed:
- Room setup:

steps.name: Purpose Clarification
steps.action: Define the core objective and success criteria

steps.name: Outcome Definition
steps.action: Identify what must be decided or produced

steps.name: Time Allocation
steps.action: Assign time blocks to each item

examples.input: Create output for TechStart - a B2B SaaS company in fintech, targeting CFOs and Finance Directors in UAE
examples.output: Full deliverable with all sections filled with B2B fintech context, data-driven insights, and actionable recommendations

checklist: Meeting objective is specific and measurable
Agenda flows from information to decision
Pre-work is distributed before the meeting
Agenda shared at least 24 hours in advance
